name: MSCI Inc.
summary: MSCI Inc. provides research-based data, analytics, and indexes for global investors. Key products include equity and fixed income indexes, portfolio construction and risk management tools, sustainability and climate solutions, and private asset data and analytics. MSCI serves approximately 6,800 clients in over 100 countries, including asset managers, hedge funds, banks, asset owners, wealth managers, and insurance companies. BlackRock is its largest client, representing 10.8% of consolidated operating revenues.

products.name: MSCI Indexes
products.description: Equity, fixed income, and multi-asset class indexes used for benchmarking, ETFs, and indexed derivatives including futures, options, and structured products.

products.name: Portfolio Construction and Risk Management Tools
products.description: Analytical models and tools for constructing and analyzing portfolios, identifying and managing drivers of investment risk and performance.

products.name: Sustainability and Climate Solutions
products.description: Data, metrics, and applications helping clients integrate sustainability and climate risk into portfolio construction, risk management, and reporting.

products.name: Private Asset Data and Analytics
products.description: Fund- and asset-level performance, transaction, and benchmark data providing transparency into private asset risk and performance.

products.name: Custom Index Capabilities
products.description: Solutions enabling clients to create tailored benchmarks reflecting specific investment views, constraints, or regulatory requirements.

partnerships.description: MSCI partners with global technology companies to accelerate development of AI capabilities to enhance solutions, insights, and client experience.
